subject: [PATCH 08/14] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on registered memory ranges. The feature includes two new ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and allow installing or removing RWP on a range. The patch also introduces a capability bit, UFFD_FEATURE_RWP, to advertise the feature. The implementation ensures that re-registering a range does not drop existing per-PTE markers, preventing stale markers from causing write-faults. The feature is not yet advertised and will be exposed in a follow-up patch.
